dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: The old road is open again. That means trouble, or treasure. Usually both.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: Press M to open the menu. It tracks party status, inventory, saves, and options now.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: Save before wandering east. Engine-things hate brave children and underprepared couriers.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: Hold it. Bandits were seen near the eastern trees.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: Move with WASD or arrows. Press E or Space to talk. Press B to test battle.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: Very official guard advice: the new save screen is not decorative. Use it.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Fresh potions! Sky tonics! Slightly haunted bread!

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Okay, I still cannot sell yet. But your inventory is real now.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Use items from the menu or in battle. That is where this starts feeling like an RPG.
